items.title: Total Patients in Enclave
items.tooltipTitle: Total Patients in the N3C Data Enclave
items.tooltipContent: Total Number of Individual Persons within the N3C Data Enclave.

items.title: Total Patients w/Maternal Health-Related Conditions in Enclave
items.tooltipTitle: Total Patients with a Maternal Health-Related Condition in the Enclave
items.tooltipContent: Total Number of Individuals within the Enclave who have had a maternal health-related condition indicated in their EHR.

items.title: Total Patients in View*
items.tooltipTitle: Total Patients with a Maternal Health-Related Condition in View
items.tooltipContent:
Total Number of Individuals within the view who have had a maternal health-related condition indicated in their EHR.

Even without filters, this total may be less than the total number of patients with a maternal health-related condition within the Enclave due to the suppression of counts less than 20.
